{{Quote|Hawk-bats are delicate creatures that need to be treated well. They must be fed regularly on fresh grains and fruit and allowed to fly about a large nest area. If they are kept in small cages or fed leftovers from other meals, they become tough and gamy|An excerpt from Handree Braman's cookbook|<ref name="EGAS" />}}
'''Handree Braman''' was an [[Ortolan/Legends|Ortolan]] [[Chef/Legends|chef]] whose [[Restaurant/Legends|restaurant]], the [[CardSafe]], was one of the most lauded on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. They wrote one of the most famous [[Handree Braman's cookbook|cookbooks]] on the preparation of [[Hawk-bat/Legends|Hawk-bats]], [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] [[Reptavian/Legends|reptavians]] found on Coruscant. In the book, Braman considered them to be delicate creatures and detailed the care that was needed for Hawk-bats to not become tough and gamy when cooked. They also detailed the cooking of the creature, which included them being cooked at one thousand [[Temperature/Legends|degrees]] for twenty [[Standard minute/Legends|minutes]]. When the Hawk-bat was cooked all the way through, Braman considered the meat to be the juiciest [[Foodstuff/Legends|meal]].<ref name="EGAS" />

An excerpt from Braman's cookbook was included in ''[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species]],'' a book assembled by a [[Ann Margaret Lewis|professional author]] using the work of [[Senior Anthropologist]] [[Mammon Hoole]]. The guide was published during or after [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]].<ref name="EGAS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Handree Braman was mentioned in [[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']], a [[2001]] reference book authored by [[Ann Margaret Lewis (real person)|Ann Margaret Lewis]].<ref name="EGAS" />
